_comment: Gap findings produced by assess_gaps.js. Each record matches sample_expected_output.json. Replace __ALERT_TARGET__ with your own Twilio test number/email before alerting.

findings.regulation: RED — USB-C common charger mandatory for portable consumer electronics [Directive 2014/53/EU, amended by Delegated Regulation (EU) 2022/2380 — common charger]
findings.requirement: From 28 December 2024, small portable consumer electronics (phones, tablets, cameras, headphones, portable speakers, handheld game consoles, e-readers) sold in the EU must use USB-C for wired charging.
findings.gap: HomeHub Controller uses "micro_usb" connector — USB-C is now mandatory for in-scope consumer devices in the EU since 28 Dec 2024.
findings.recommended_action: Replace micro-USB or proprietary charging ports with USB-C on all in-scope products.

alert.message: HomePulse Smart GmbH: HomeHub Controller — RED gap by 2024-12-28. Replace micro-USB or proprietary charging ports with USB-C on all in-scope produ Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=OJ:L_202302553

findings.regulation: RED — cybersecurity requirements (EN 18031) for internet-connected devices [Directive 2014/53/EU Art. 3(3)(d)(e)(f) — Delegated Reg. (EU) 2022/30]
findings.requirement: From 1 August 2025, internet-connected radio equipment (routers, smart-home hubs, wearables, IoT devices, cameras) must meet cybersecurity requirements under EN 18031 (network protection, access control, personal data).
findings.gap: WaveGo Bluetooth Speaker is an internet-connected consumer radio device; no documented EN 18031 cybersecurity conformity assessment found.
findings.recommended_action: Conduct EN 18031 conformity assessment and update DoC / technical file before August 2025.

alert.message: SonicWave Audio SARL: WaveGo Bluetooth Speaker — RED gap by 2025-08-01. Conduct EN 18031 conformity assessment and update DoC / technical file before Au Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32022R2420

findings.regulation: Battery Regulation — button cell compartments must be child-safe (Aug 2026) [Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Article 12 — button cell child safety]
findings.requirement: From 18 August 2026, consumer appliances containing button-cell or coin batteries must have battery compartments that are not accessible to children without a tool or two simultaneous actions.
findings.gap: MotionSense Sensor contains a button-cell battery accessible without a tool or double-action — non-compliant with Battery Reg Art. 12 from Aug 2026.
findings.recommended_action: Redesign battery compartment closure (tool/double-action lock) and add required warning label.

alert.message: HomePulse Smart GmbH: MotionSense Sensor — Battery gap by 2026-08-18. Redesign battery compartment closure (tool/double-action lock) and add required  Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1542/oj

findings.regulation: Battery Regulation — industrial battery passport (deadline 18 Feb 2027) [Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Article 77]
findings.requirement: Industrial batteries with a capacity > 2 kWh placed on the EU market on or after 18 February 2027 must carry a digital battery passport.
findings.gap: Industrial battery (2500 Wh, IndusCell 2.5kWh Module) sold in the EU without a digital battery passport.
findings.recommended_action: Create and register the battery passport data carrier before the deadline.

alert.message: CellCore Energy Sp. z o.o.: IndusCell 2.5kWh Module — Battery gap by 2027-02-18. Create and register the battery passport data carrier before the deadline. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1542/oj

findings.regulation: Battery Regulation — LMT battery passport (deadline 18 Feb 2027) [Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Article 77]
findings.requirement: Light-means-of-transport (LMT) batteries (e-bikes, e-scooters, etc.
findings.gap: LMT battery (e-Scooter Battery Pack 280Wh) sold in the EU without a digital battery passport / data carrier (QR code).
findings.recommended_action: Create and register the battery passport data carrier before the deadline.

alert.message: RideVolt Mobility GmbH: e-Scooter Battery Pack 280Wh — Battery gap by 2027-02-18. Create and register the battery passport data carrier before the deadline. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1542/oj

findings.regulation: PPWR — plastic film / single-use packaging restrictions [Regulation (EU) 2025/40 — Packaging and Packaging Waste]
findings.requirement: The new PPWR entered into force in February 2025.
findings.gap: RoboPup Interactive Toy is packaged in plastic film; PPWR requires phase-out or recycled-content/recyclability compliance.
findings.recommended_action: Audit product packaging; replace plastic film with compliant alternatives or document recycled-content compliance.

alert.message: PlayBright Toys S.r.l.: RoboPup Interactive Toy — PPWR gap by 2028-01-01. Audit product packaging; replace plastic film with compliant alternatives or doc Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2025/40/oj

findings.regulation: RoHS — restriction of lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium [Directive 2011/65/EU, Annex II]
findings.requirement: EEE placed on the EU market must not contain lead >0.
findings.gap: NordBeam LED Panel 600 contains restricted heavy metal(s): lead. Must be below RoHS threshold or hold a valid documented exemption.
findings.recommended_action: All EU-market EEE must be below threshold or hold a valid documented exemption.

alert.message: LumaNord Lighting GmbH: NordBeam LED Panel 600 — RoHS gap. All EU-market EEE must be below threshold or hold a valid documented exemption. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/dir/2011/65/oj

findings.regulation: ECHA SVHC Candidate List (? substances as of 2026-06-26) [Regulation (EC) 1907/2006, Article 59 — SVHC Candidate List]
findings.requirement: The SVHC Candidate List is updated twice yearly.
findings.gap: FlexGlow RGB Strip 5m contains SVHC(s) on ECHA Candidate List: DEHP. REACH Art. 33 communication + SCIP notification required.
findings.recommended_action: Check all products containing BPA, DEHP, DBP, BBP, PFAS_PFHxA against current Candidate List; communicate SVHC presence to customers/ECHA SCIP database.

alert.message: LumaNord Lighting GmbH: FlexGlow RGB Strip 5m — REACH gap. Check all products containing BPA, DEHP, DBP, BBP, PFAS_PFHxA against current Ca Source: https://echa.europa.eu/candidate-list-table

findings.regulation: REACH restriction — PFHxA group (PFAS) in consumer articles [Regulation (EC) 1907/2006, Annex XVII — Entry on PFHxA group]
findings.requirement: The PFHxA group restriction (Annex XVII Entry 68) prohibits placing on the EU market consumer articles containing PFHxA and its salts/esters above 25 ppb.
findings.gap: PulseBand Activity Tracker contains PFAS/PFHxA coating/component. Restricted under REACH Annex XVII Entry 68 (≥25 ppb in consumer articles).
findings.recommended_action: Test water-repellent coatings/components for PFHxA; replace or obtain analytical proof below threshold.

findings.recommended_action: All EU-market EEE must be below threshold or hold a valid documented exemption.

alert.message: CableMax Connect S.L.: UltraLink USB-C Cable 2m — RoHS gap. All EU-market EEE must be below threshold or hold a valid documented exemption. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/dir/2011/65/oj

findings.requirement: EEE placed on the EU market must not contain lead >0.

findings.regulation: POPs — decabromodiphenyl ether (decaBDE) restriction in EEE [Regulation (EU) 2019/1021, Annex I]
findings.requirement: DecaBDE (decabromodiphenyl ether) is listed in the POPs Regulation Annex I.
findings.gap: EdgeNode Industrial Module contains decaBDE flame retardant, which is prohibited under the POPs Regulation (>10 mg/kg in articles).
findings.recommended_action: Replace decaBDE flame retardants with compliant alternatives and update test reports.

alert.message: GridSense IoT BV: EdgeNode Industrial Module — POPs gap. Replace decaBDE flame retardants with compliant alternatives and update test rep Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2019/1021/oj

findings.regulation: ECHA SVHC Candidate List (? substances as of 2026-06-26) [Regulation (EC) 1907/2006, Article 59 — SVHC Candidate List]
findings.requirement: The SVHC Candidate List is updated twice yearly.
findings.gap: SkyScout Camera Drone contains SVHC(s) on ECHA Candidate List: PFAS_PFHxA. REACH Art. 33 communication + SCIP notification required.
findings.recommended_action: Check all products containing BPA, DEHP, DBP, BBP, PFAS_PFHxA against current Candidate List; communicate SVHC presence to customers/ECHA SCIP database.

alert.message: AeroSense Drones SARL: SkyScout Camera Drone — REACH gap. Check all products containing BPA, DEHP, DBP, BBP, PFAS_PFHxA against current Ca Source: https://echa.europa.eu/candidate-list-table

findings.regulation: REACH restriction — PFHxA group (PFAS) in consumer articles [Regulation (EC) 1907/2006, Annex XVII — Entry on PFHxA group]
findings.requirement: The PFHxA group restriction (Annex XVII Entry 68) prohibits placing on the EU market consumer articles containing PFHxA and its salts/esters above 25 ppb.
findings.gap: SkyScout Camera Drone contains PFAS/PFHxA coating/component. Restricted under REACH Annex XVII Entry 68 (≥25 ppb in consumer articles).
findings.recommended_action: Test water-repellent coatings/components for PFHxA; replace or obtain analytical proof below threshold.

alert.message: AeroSense Drones SARL: SkyScout Camera Drone — REACH gap. Test water-repellent coatings/components for PFHxA; replace or obtain analytical Source: https://echa.europa.eu/registry-of-restriction-intentions/-/dislist/details/0b0236e185c8db23

findings.regulation: PPWR — plastic film / single-use packaging restrictions [Regulation (EU) 2025/40 — Packaging and Packaging Waste]
findings.requirement: The new PPWR entered into force in February 2025.
findings.gap: FlexGlow RGB Strip 5m is packaged in plastic film; PPWR requires phase-out or recycled-content/recyclability compliance.
findings.recommended_action: Audit product packaging; replace plastic film with compliant alternatives or document recycled-content compliance.

alert.message: LumaNord Lighting GmbH: FlexGlow RGB Strip 5m — PPWR gap by 2028-01-01. Audit product packaging; replace plastic film with compliant alternatives or doc Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2025/40/oj
